system.descriptor: Drive covers the operation of ground vehicles, from simple wheeled transports to tracked assault vehicles and walkers.
system.uses:
Uses: Driving ground vehicles, performing evasive manoeuvres, navigating difficult terrain.
Special Use: Pursuit: During a vehicle chase, make an opposed Drive test to gain or close distance on another vehicle.
Special Use: Stunts: Particularly daring manoeuvres (jumps, controlled spins, ramming) require a Drive test with modifiers based on difficulty.

description.value:
Drive covers the operation of ground vehicles, from simple wheeled transports to tracked assault vehicles and walkers.

In Deathwatch, Drive is a separate skill from Pilot, unlike Dark Heresy 2e where both are folded into Operate.
